meta.title: João Maurício | Sculptor & Visual Artist
meta.description: Portfolio of João Maurício, sculptor and visual artist. Works in bronze, marble and contemporary materials.

hero.name: João Maurício
hero.bio: Exploring form and void through materials that resist time. My works dialogue between the classic and the contemporary, seeking the essence of human expression.

featured.title: Featured Work
featured.subtitle: Interactive 3D Visualization
featured.description: Coming soon: explore this work in detail with three-dimensional visualization. Drag, rotate and zoom to see every texture.

artworks.title: Asylum
artworks.description: A piece of profound realism about vulnerability and memory. The porcelain figure holds a paper fragment, like someone guarding an entire story.

artworks.title: Ritual
artworks.description: A moving representation of affection and family heritage. The sculpture immortalizes a profound ritual of care, capturing intergenerational tenderness in a simple gesture.

artworks.title: Fluid Time
artworks.description: The metamorphosis of stone into movement. Italian Carrara.

artworks.title: Invisible Structure
artworks.description: Dialogue between weight and lightness. Urban installation.

artworks.title: Still Gesture
artworks.description: Capturing the moment before action. Performative series.

artworks.title: Veil of Isis
artworks.description: Textures that reveal and conceal simultaneously.

artworks.title: Breath
artworks.description: Cycle of expansion and contraction. Aged Imbuia.

items.title: Forms of the Invisible
items.location: Museum of Modern Art, São Paulo
items.description: Solo exhibition with 12 new works exploring the materiality of absence.

items.title: Advanced Clay Modeling
items.description: Semester workshop on modeling techniques for figurative and abstract sculpture.

items.title: Living Memory
items.description: Community sculpture project co-created with residents from different regions of the city.

items.title: Contemporary Brazilian Sculpture
items.description: Group show with 15 national artists in dialogue with the architectural space.

items.title: Art and Urban Space
items.description: Free course on sculptural interventions in public spaces.

items.title: Public Collection
items.description: Installation of 8 permanent works in city public parks.

items.title: Material Dialogues
items.description: Series of interactive installations inviting the public to touch the works.

items.title: Casting for Artists
items.description: Practical workshop on bronze and aluminum casting techniques.

items.title: Artist Residency
items.description: 3-month residency in the birthplace of Carrara marble, resulting in 5 works.
